title: Anthropic Scheduled Claude Opus 4.1 API Retirement For August 2026
summary: Anthropic's Claude Platform release notes announced deprecation of claude-opus-4-1-20250805 and scheduled Claude API retirement for August 5, 2026, with migration guidance toward newer Opus models.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official release notes reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Remove claude-opus-4-1-20250805 from production routing, eval baselines, fallback chains, and customer-visible model selectors before August 5, 2026.

detail.migration_notes: Anthropic release notes recommend moving away from the Claude Opus 4.1 API model before the scheduled retirement date. Validate quality, cost, and parameter compatibility on replacement models before changing defaults.

limitations: This event records the Claude API retirement signal only; cloud-provider hosted availability can have separate lifecycle notices.
No provider release-note body is copied into APW.
